title: New Ecommerce Tools: May 20, 2026
description:
This week: quick commerce, SMS marketing, SEO, agentic storefronts, multichannel management, flexible payments, AI selling agents, and dynamic product ads.
The post New Ecommerce Tools: May 20, 2026 appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
title_en: New Ecommerce Tools Launch: Quick Commerce and AI Selling Agents Lead Innovation Wave
summary_ko: 이커머스 업계에 퀵커머스, SMS 마케팅, SEO, 에이전틱 스토어프런트 등 새로운 툴들이 출시되었습니다. AI 판매 에이전트와 동적 상품 광고 기능이 주목받고 있습니다. 멀티채널 관리와 유연한 결제 솔루션도 포함되어 이커머스 운영 효율성을 높일 것으로 예상됩니다.
summary_en: New ecommerce tools have been launched including quick commerce, SMS marketing, SEO, and agentic storefronts. AI selling agents and dynamic product ads are gaining attention for their advanced capabilities. Multichannel management and flexible payment solutions are also included to enhance ecommerce operational efficiency.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 에이전틱 스토어프런트와 AI 판매 에이전트를 활용해 개인화된 고객 경험을 제공하고 운영 자동화를 통해 효율성을 극대화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should leverage agentic storefronts and AI selling agents to deliver personalized customer experiences and maximize operational efficiency through automation.
key_points: Agentic storefronts enable autonomous customer interaction
AI selling agents automate sales processes
Dynamic product ads improve targeting efficiency
Multichannel management tools streamline operations
one_line_insight_ko: 에이전틱 기술이 이커머스 운영을 자동화하며 AI 판매 에이전트가 새로운 고객 접점의 표준이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Agentic technology is automating ecommerce operations with AI selling agents becoming the new standard for customer touchpoints.

title: Best AI search analytics tools for marketing teams
description: I’ve spent the last year watching marketing teams scramble to understand why their organic traffic reports tell one story while their pipeline tells another. The missing link is almost always a need for AI search analytics tools.
title_en: AI Search Analytics Tools Bridge the Gap Between Traffic and Pipeline for Marketing Teams
summary_ko: 마케팅 팀들이 유기적 트래픽 보고서와 실제 파이프라인 간의 차이를 이해하는 데 어려움을 겪고 있습니다. AI 검색 분석 도구가 이러한 격차를 해결하는 핵심 솔루션으로 주목받고 있습니다. 마케팅 성과 측정의 정확성을 높이는 데 필수적인 도구로 평가되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Marketing teams are struggling to understand the disconnect between organic traffic reports and actual pipeline performance. AI search analytics tools are emerging as the key solution to bridge this gap. These tools are being recognized as essential for improving the accuracy of marketing performance measurement.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI 검색 분석 도구를 도입해 마케팅 ROI 측정의 정확성을 높이고 트래픽과 실제 매출 간의 연결고리를 명확히 파악해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should adopt AI search analytics tools to improve marketing ROI measurement accuracy and clearly understand the connection between traffic and actual sales.
key_points: Gap exists between traffic reports and pipeline performance
AI search analytics provide missing measurement links
Tools essential for accurate marketing performance tracking
Year-long observation of marketing team challenges
one_line_insight_ko: AI 검색 분석 도구가 마케팅 성과의 실제 비즈니스 임팩트를 정확하게 측정할 수 있는 새로운 표준이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI search analytics tools are becoming the new standard for accurately measuring the real business impact of marketing performance.

title: U.K. brands spend more on retail media but ‘disconnected commerce’ hampers faster growth
description: U.K. and EU spending on RMNs is rising, but marketers say issues around measurement and internal tugs-of-war are holding back upper-funnel investment.
title_en: UK Retail Media Spending Grows Despite Measurement Challenges and Internal Disconnects
summary_ko: 영국과 EU 지역의 리테일 미디어 네트워크(RMN) 투자가 증가하고 있습니다. 그러나 측정 문제와 내부 조직 간 갈등으로 인해 상위 퍼널 투자가 제약받고 있습니다. 연결되지 않은 커머스 환경이 더 빠른 성장을 방해하는 주요 요인으로 지적되고 있습니다.
summary_en: UK and EU spending on retail media networks (RMNs) is increasing significantly. However, measurement issues and internal organizational conflicts are limiting upper-funnel investment growth. Disconnected commerce environments are identified as the main factor hampering faster growth potential.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 리테일 미디어 투자 확대 시 측정 체계를 사전에 구축하고 내부 조직 간 협업 체계를 정립해 투자 효율성을 극대화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should establish measurement frameworks and internal collaboration systems before expanding retail media investments to maximize investment efficiency.
key_points: UK/EU retail media network spending is rising
Measurement challenges limit upper-funnel investment
Internal organizational conflicts hamper growth
Disconnected commerce environments create barriers
one_line_insight_ko: 리테일 미디어 투자 증가에도 불구하고 측정 체계의 부재와 조직 간 단절이 성장 잠재력을 제약하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Despite increasing retail media investment, lack of measurement systems and organizational disconnects are constraining growth potential.

title: ‘Trust becomes the product’: Marketers grapple with Google’s new suite of AI-powered ad agents
description: First comes innovation, then comes transparency. At least that seems to be Google’s approach as the tech behemoth enters its agentic era. At Google Marketing Live (GML) yesterday, Google announced a new souped up suite of agentic ad tools backed by its LLM, Gemini. Google plans to roll out more ads in AI Mode in […]
title_en: Google Unveils AI-Powered Ad Agents as Trust Becomes Central Product for Marketers
summary_ko: 구글이 제미니 LLM 기반의 새로운 에이전틱 광고 도구 스위트를 발표했습니다. 구글 마케팅 라이브에서 AI 모드의 광고 확대 계획을 공개했습니다. 마케터들에게 신뢰가 핵심 제품으로 부상하면서 투명성과 혁신 사이의 균형이 중요해지고 있습니다.
summary_en: Google announced a new suite of agentic advertising tools powered by Gemini LLM at Google Marketing Live. The company revealed plans to expand ads in AI Mode significantly. Trust is emerging as a central product for marketers as the balance between transparency and innovation becomes crucial.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 구글의 AI 광고 에이전트 도입 시 투명성과 제어 가능성을 확보하면서도 자동화의 이점을 활용하는 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should develop strategies that secure transparency and controllability while leveraging automation benefits when adopting Google's AI ad agents.
key_points: Google launched Gemini LLM-powered agentic ad tools
AI Mode ads expansion planned across platform
Trust becomes central product concern for marketers
Balance needed between innovation and transparency
one_line_insight_ko: 구글의 AI 광고 에이전트 출시로 마케팅 자동화가 가속화되지만 신뢰와 투명성이 새로운 경쟁 요소로 부상하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Google's AI ad agents launch accelerates marketing automation but trust and transparency emerge as new competitive factors.

title: Lowe’s efforts to win over pros could save it from the home sector’s challenges
description: The retailer — which saw sales increase 10% in Q1 — is turning to the customer segment as DIY demand remains down.
title_en: Lowe's Pro Customer Focus Strategy Shields Against Home Sector Downturn Challenges
summary_ko: 로우즈가 1분기 매출 10% 증가를 기록하며 전문가 고객층 확보에 집중하고 있습니다. DIY 수요 감소 상황에서 프로 고객 세그먼트를 통해 홈 섹터의 도전을 극복하려는 전략을 추진하고 있습니다. 이 접근법이 업계 침체기에 효과적인 방어 전략으로 평가받고 있습니다.
summary_en: Lowe's recorded a 10% sales increase in Q1 while focusing on winning over professional customers. The retailer is pursuing a strategy to overcome home sector challenges through the pro customer segment amid declining DIY demand. This approach is being evaluated as an effective defensive strategy during industry downturns.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 소비자 수요 변화 시 전문가나 B2B 고객층과 같은 안정적인 세그먼트를 확보해 리스크를 분산하는 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should consider securing stable segments like professionals or B2B customers to diversify risks during consumer demand changes.
key_points: Lowe's achieved 10% Q1 sales growth
Pro customer segment focus amid DIY decline
Strategy shields against home sector challenges
Professional customers provide stability during downturns
one_line_insight_ko: 시장 침체기에 안정적인 전문가 고객 세그먼트 확보가 리테일러의 핵심 방어 전략으로 부상하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Securing stable professional customer segments is emerging as a key defensive strategy for retailers during market downturns.

title: Can Target’s small upgrades to carts, bathrooms lead to big wins?
description: The retailer's efforts to modernize its experience aim to create durable long-term value for a key demographic: busy families.
title_en: Target's Small Store Upgrades Aim for Big Family Shopping Wins
summary_ko: 타겟이 쇼핑카트와 화장실 등 매장 시설을 현대화하여 고객 경험을 개선하고 있습니다. 이러한 소규모 업그레이드는 바쁜 가족 고객층을 위한 장기적 가치 창출을 목표로 합니다. 매장 내 편의시설 개선을 통해 고객 만족도와 재방문율을 높이려는 전략입니다.
summary_en: Target is modernizing store facilities including shopping carts and bathrooms to enhance customer experience. These small-scale upgrades target busy families as a key demographic for long-term value creation. The retailer aims to boost customer satisfaction and repeat visits through improved in-store convenience facilities.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 온라인뿐만 아니라 오프라인 고객 접점에서의 편의성 개선이 브랜드 충성도 향상에 중요함을 인식해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should recognize that convenience improvements at both online and offline customer touchpoints are crucial for enhancing brand loyalty.
key_points: Target focuses on modernizing basic store amenities for better customer experience
Strategy targets busy families as core demographic
Small upgrades aim to create durable long-term customer value
one_line_insight_ko: 기본적인 매장 편의시설 개선도 고객 경험 향상의 중요한 요소가 될 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Basic store amenity improvements can be significant factors in enhancing customer experience.

title: Klarna releases AI search app for shopping in ChatGPT
description:
Payments provider Klarna has launched an artificial intelligence (AI)-powered app in OpenAI’s ChatGPT centered around shopping and search. The Klarna Shopping Search app in ChatGPT enables users to describe the types of products they’re looking for and, in one conversation, see visual results with up-to-date prices, availability and offers from multiple merchants, according to the […]
The post Klarna releases AI search app for shopping in ChatGPT appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Klarna Launches AI Shopping Search App in ChatGPT for Multi-Merchant Discovery
summary_ko: 클라르나가 OpenAI의 ChatGPT에 AI 기반 쇼핑 검색 앱을 출시했습니다. 사용자는 원하는 제품을 설명하면 여러 판매자의 최신 가격, 재고, 할인 정보를 한 번의 대화로 확인할 수 있습니다. 이 앱은 시각적 결과와 함께 통합된 쇼핑 경험을 제공합니다.
summary_en: Klarna has launched an AI-powered shopping search app in OpenAI's ChatGPT platform. Users can describe desired products and view visual results with up-to-date prices, availability and offers from multiple merchants in one conversation. The app provides an integrated shopping experience with visual product displays.
so_what_ko: LG는 ChatGPT와 같은 대화형 AI 플랫폼에 제품 검색 기능을 통합하여 고객의 제품 발견 과정을 혁신할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: LG can innovate customer product discovery by integrating shopping functionality into conversational AI platforms like ChatGPT.
key_points: Klarna integrates shopping search capabilities directly into ChatGPT
Users can discover products from multiple merchants through conversational interface
Visual results include real-time pricing and availability information
one_line_insight_ko: 대화형 AI와 쇼핑 검색의 결합이 새로운 제품 발견 경험을 창조하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: The integration of conversational AI with shopping search is creating new product discovery experiences.

title: Home Depot puts AI tools for Pro customers into one workspace
description:
Home Depot has deployed strategies to expand on its B2B sales through its Pro segment in Q1, including refining artificial intelligence (AI) tools, bolstering partnerships and making another acquisition. CEO Ed Decker said Home Depot’s objective is to win more Pro business, products and purchase occasions. He claimed that no retailer has the scale or […]
The post Home Depot puts AI tools for Pro customers into one workspace appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Home Depot Consolidates AI Tools for Pro Customers into Unified Workspace
summary_ko: 홈디포가 B2B 프로 고객을 위한 AI 도구들을 하나의 작업공간으로 통합했습니다. 1분기 전략에는 AI 도구 개선, 파트너십 강화, 추가 인수가 포함되었습니다. CEO는 더 많은 프로 사업자의 비즈니스, 제품, 구매 기회를 확보하는 것이 목표라고 밝혔습니다.
summary_en: Home Depot has consolidated AI tools for Pro customers into a unified workspace as part of Q1 B2B expansion strategies. The initiatives include refining AI tools, strengthening partnerships, and making acquisitions. The CEO stated the objective is to capture more Pro business opportunities, products, and purchase occasions.
so_what_ko: LG는 B2B 고객을 위한 AI 도구를 통합하여 전문 고객의 업무 효율성을 높이고 비즈니스 관계를 강화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: LG can enhance professional customer work efficiency and strengthen business relationships by consolidating AI tools for B2B customers.
key_points: Home Depot creates unified AI workspace for Pro segment customers
Strategy includes AI tool refinement and partnership expansion
Focus on winning more professional business purchase occasions
one_line_insight_ko: B2B 고객을 위한 AI 도구 통합이 전문 고객 세그먼트에서의 경쟁 우위를 만들어내고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI tool consolidation for B2B customers is creating competitive advantages in professional customer segments.

title: Google unveils its new Universal Cart for agentic commerce
description:
Google kicked off its annual Google I/O developer conference on May 19 with numerous announcements, including new details about its latest agentic commerce and checkout tool, the Universal Cart. Universal Cart is built on top of Google’s Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP), which enables artificial intelligence (AI) agents to communicate with payments infrastructure in ecommerce transactions. […]
The post Google unveils its new Universal Cart for agentic commerce appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Google Unveils Universal Cart for Agentic Commerce at I/O Conference
summary_ko: 구글이 연례 I/O 개발자 컨퍼런스에서 에이전틱 커머스를 위한 유니버설 카트를 공개했습니다. 이 도구는 구글의 유니버설 커머스 프로토콜(UCP) 기반으로 구축되어 AI 에이전트가 전자상거래 거래에서 결제 인프라와 통신할 수 있게 합니다. 에이전틱 커머스와 체크아웃 기능을 통합한 혁신적인 솔루션입니다.
summary_en: Google unveiled its Universal Cart for agentic commerce at the annual I/O developer conference. The tool is built on Google's Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP), enabling AI agents to communicate with payments infrastructure in ecommerce transactions. This represents an innovative solution integrating agentic commerce with checkout functionality.
so_what_ko: LG는 구글의 유니버설 카트와 같은 에이전틱 커머스 플랫폼과의 통합을 통해 AI 기반 자동화된 구매 경험을 제공할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: LG can provide AI-powered automated purchasing experiences by integrating with agentic commerce platforms like Google's Universal Cart.
key_points: Google launches Universal Cart for agentic commerce transactions
Built on Universal Commerce Protocol enabling AI agent-payment infrastructure communication
Represents major advancement in automated AI-driven shopping experiences
one_line_insight_ko: 구글의 유니버설 카트는 AI 에이전트가 주도하는 자동화된 쇼핑의 새로운 시대를 열고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Google's Universal Cart is ushering in a new era of AI agent-driven automated shopping.

title: Google upgrades AI search ads: what marketers need to know
description: A range of new tools announced at Marketing Live follow the platform enacting a signifcant overhaul of the search experience to prirotize AI chats.
title_en: Google Upgrades AI Search Ads: Key Changes for Marketers
summary_ko: 구글이 마케팅 라이브 이벤트에서 AI 검색 광고의 대폭적인 업그레이드를 발표했습니다. 이는 검색 경험을 AI 채팅 중심으로 재편하는 플랫폼 전반적 개편의 일환입니다. 마케터들이 알아야 할 다양한 새로운 도구들이 공개되었습니다.
summary_en: Google announced significant upgrades to AI search ads at the Marketing Live event. This follows a major platform overhaul prioritizing AI chats in the search experience. A range of new tools were revealed that marketers need to understand.
so_what_ko: LG는 구글의 AI 검색 광고 변화에 대응하여 마케팅 전략을 조정하고 새로운 AI 기반 광고 도구를 활용해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG must adapt marketing strategies to Google's AI search ad changes and leverage new AI-powered advertising tools.
key_points: Google announces major AI search ads upgrades at Marketing Live
Changes follow significant search experience overhaul prioritizing AI chats
New tools require marketers to adapt their advertising strategies
one_line_insight_ko: 구글의 AI 중심 검색 광고 전환은 마케터들의 전략적 접근 방식을 근본적으로 바꿔놓고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Google's AI-centric search advertising transformation is fundamentally changing marketers' strategic approaches.

title: Ally courts millennial, Gen Z customers with new brand platform
description: Developed with Anomaly LA, the “Life Today” campaign sees the digital bank throw playful shade on competitors’ brick-and-mortar model.
title_en: Ally Courts Millennial and Gen Z Customers with New Digital-First Brand Platform
summary_ko: 디지털 은행 Ally가 밀레니얼과 Z세대를 타겟으로 한 새로운 브랜드 플랫폼을 출시했습니다. Anomaly LA와 함께 개발한 'Life Today' 캠페인은 경쟁사들의 오프라인 지점 모델을 재치있게 비판합니다. 이 캠페인은 디지털 뱅킹의 장점을 강조하며 젊은 세대의 관심을 끌고 있습니다.
summary_en: Digital bank Ally has launched a new brand platform targeting millennials and Gen Z customers. The 'Life Today' campaign, developed with Anomaly LA, playfully critiques competitors' brick-and-mortar banking models. The campaign emphasizes the advantages of digital banking to attract younger demographics.
so_what_ko: 금융 서비스에서도 젊은 세대를 타겟으로 한 디지털 퍼스트 마케팅이 중요해지고 있어, LG D2C도 세대별 맞춤형 디지털 경험 전략을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As digital-first marketing becomes crucial for targeting younger generations in financial services, LG D2C should strengthen generation-specific digital experience strategies.
key_points: Ally targets millennials and Gen Z with digital-first brand platform
'Life Today' campaign critiques traditional brick-and-mortar banking
Campaign developed with creative agency Anomaly LA
one_line_insight_ko: 디지털 네이티브 세대를 위한 브랜드 플랫폼은 전통적 경쟁사 대비 차별화된 가치 제안이 핵심입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Brand platforms for digital natives require differentiated value propositions against traditional competitors.

title: Centenario Tequila celebrates Mexican pride in campaign ahead of World Cup
description: “Todo o Nada” was led by an all-Mexican creative team and will run in the U.S. across linear TV, digital video and both paid and organic social channels.
title_en: Centenario Tequila Celebrates Mexican Pride in World Cup Campaign
summary_ko: 세기테킬라(Centenario Tequila)가 월드컵을 앞두고 멕시코 자부심을 주제로 한 캠페인을 출시했습니다. 'Todo o Nada' 캠페인은 올-멕시칸 크리에이티브 팀이 주도했습니다. 미국에서 TV, 디지털 비디오, 소셜 채널을 통해 진행됩니다.
summary_en: Centenario Tequila has launched a campaign celebrating Mexican pride ahead of the World Cup. The 'Todo o Nada' campaign was led by an all-Mexican creative team. It will run in the U.S. across linear TV, digital video, and social channels.
so_what_ko: 스포츠 이벤트를 활용한 문화적 자부심 마케팅이 브랜드 차별화에 효과적임을 보여주어, LG D2C도 한국 문화 요소를 글로벌 캠페인에 활용할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Cultural pride marketing leveraging sports events proves effective for brand differentiation, suggesting LG D2C could incorporate Korean cultural elements in global campaigns.
key_points: World Cup-themed campaign celebrating Mexican cultural pride
All-Mexican creative team leading campaign development
Multi-channel approach across TV, digital, and social platforms
one_line_insight_ko: 스포츠 이벤트와 문화적 정체성을 결합한 마케팅은 감정적 연결을 통해 브랜드 충성도를 높입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Marketing that combines sports events with cultural identity builds brand loyalty through emotional connection.

title: LiveRamp’s Data Gives Publicis a New Way Into Commerce Media and Agentic AI
description: Publicis Groupe's $2.2 billion acquisition of data firm LiveRamp could help the holding company better compete in a commerce media landscape dominated by Amazon.
title_en: LiveRamp Data Acquisition Gives Publicis New Edge in Commerce Media and Agentic AI
summary_ko: 퍼블리시스 그룹이 22억 달러에 인수한 데이터 기업 LiveRamp을 통해 커머스 미디어와 에이전틱 AI 영역에서 경쟁력을 확보했습니다. 이번 인수로 퍼블리시스는 아마존이 지배하는 커머스 미디어 시장에서 더 나은 경쟁 위치를 확보할 수 있게 되었습니다. 데이터 기반 AI 에이전트 기능이 광고 홀딩컴퍼니의 핵심 차별화 요소로 부상하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Publicis Groupe's $2.2 billion acquisition of data firm LiveRamp provides the holding company with new capabilities in commerce media and agentic AI. This acquisition positions Publicis to better compete in a commerce media landscape dominated by Amazon. Data-driven AI agent capabilities are emerging as key differentiators for advertising holding companies.
so_what_ko: 대형 광고 홀딩컴퍼니들이 데이터와 AI 에이전트 기능에 대규모 투자하고 있어, LG D2C도 자체 데이터 플랫폼과 AI 에이전트 기능 구축을 통해 경쟁력을 확보해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As major advertising holding companies invest heavily in data and AI agent capabilities, LG D2C must build its own data platform and agentic AI functions to remain competitive.
key_points: $2.2 billion LiveRamp acquisition strengthens Publicis' data capabilities
Strategic move to compete in Amazon-dominated commerce media space
Agentic AI becomes key differentiator in advertising industry
one_line_insight_ko: 데이터 기반 AI 에이전트는 커머스 미디어에서 아마존에 대항할 수 있는 핵심 경쟁 무기가 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Data-driven AI agents are becoming essential competitive weapons against Amazon in commerce media.

title: Omnicom’s John Wren Made More Than Double All Other Advertising Holdco CEOs Combined in 2025
description: Omnicom CEO John Wren earned nearly $70 million in 2025—more than twice the combined pay of every other major advertising holdco CEO, with Publicis' Arthur Sadoun trailing as the next-highest earner at $9.4 million.
title_en: Omnicom CEO John Wren Earned Nearly $70M in 2025, Double Other Holdco CEOs Combined
summary_ko: 옴니콤 CEO 존 렌(John Wren)이 2025년 약 7천만 달러를 벌어 다른 주요 광고 홀딩컴퍼니 CEO들 합계의 두 배 이상을 기록했습니다. 퍼블리시스의 아서 사둔(Arthur Sadoun)이 940만 달러로 두 번째였습니다. 광고업계 내 임원 보수 격차가 크게 벌어지고 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Omnicom CEO John Wren earned nearly $70 million in 2025, more than twice the combined compensation of all other major advertising holdco CEOs. Publicis' Arthur Sadoun was the second-highest earner at $9.4 million. This highlights significant executive compensation disparities within the advertising industry.
so_what_ko: 광고업계의 극심한 보상 격차는 인재 확보 경쟁이 치열해지고 있음을 의미하므로, LG D2C는 핵심 마케팅 인재 유치를 위한 경쟁력 있는 보상 체계를 마련해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Extreme compensation gaps in advertising indicate intensifying talent competition, requiring LG D2C to develop competitive compensation packages for key marketing talent.
key_points: John Wren earned $70M, exceeding other holdco CEOs' combined pay
Arthur Sadoun was second-highest at $9.4M
Significant executive compensation disparities in advertising industry
one_line_insight_ko: 광고업계 최고 경영진 보상 격차 확대는 인재 확보 경쟁 심화와 업계 양극화를 반영합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Widening executive compensation gaps in advertising reflect intensifying talent competition and industry polarization.

title: What’s the future of AI and RCS in mobile messaging?
description:
Consumers are caught in a battle between volume and relevance when it comes to messages, and AI can either help or hurt the problem. 
The post What’s the future of AI and RCS in mobile messaging? appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI and RCS Transform Mobile Messaging: Balancing Volume vs. Relevance
summary_ko: 모바일 메시징에서 AI와 RCS(Rich Communication Services) 기술의 미래가 주목받고 있습니다. 소비자들은 메시지 볼륨과 관련성 사이에서 갈등을 겪고 있으며, AI는 이 문제를 해결하거나 악화시킬 수 있습니다. 개인화된 메시징 경험을 위한 AI 활용이 핵심 과제로 대두되고 있습니다.
summary_en: The future of AI and RCS (Rich Communication Services) in mobile messaging is gaining attention as key technologies. Consumers face a conflict between message volume and relevance, and AI can either help solve or exacerbate this problem. Leveraging AI for personalized messaging experiences emerges as a critical challenge.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 개인화 메시징이 고객 경험의 핵심이 되고 있어, LG D2C는 RCS와 AI를 활용한 스마트 메시징 전략으로 고객 참여도를 높여야 합니다.
so_what_en: As AI-powered personalized messaging becomes central to customer experience, LG D2C should enhance customer engagement through smart messaging strategies using RCS and AI.
key_points: AI and RCS emerging as transformative technologies in mobile messaging
Consumer challenge: balancing message volume with relevance
AI personalization critical for improving messaging experience
one_line_insight_ko: AI 기반 메시징 개인화는 고객 참여와 관련성을 동시에 높이는 필수 전략이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-powered messaging personalization is becoming essential for simultaneously increasing customer engagement and relevance.
